name_en: Small 30cm (Black) OHANEL🚩🔮🔮25C Bucket Drawstring Bag! A new little cutie added to the Chanel series, deer suede. Its body is actually a small bucket bag, the leather is soft matte suede 🐂 Can fit some cute mini earphone cases 🎧, looks like a carefully curated outfit. Large Double C logo design, can be adjusted! Charming details, ⛓ chain is non-adjustable, vintage gold hardware, has a strong vintage vibe 👅 Can't help but praise this piece ✨ Style: 99921 Size: 30x 26x 14
